name: python3-docker
title: python3-docker
summary: Python 3 wrapper to access docker.io's control socket
description:
Python 3 wrapper to access docker.io's control socket
This package contains oodles of routines that aid in controlling
docker.io over it's socket control, the same way the docker.io
client controls the daemon.
.
This package provides Python 3 module bindings only.
